The '''Mark IV Powersuit''' was a [[Power armor/Legends|powersuit]] developed by [[Telgorn Corporation/Legends|Telgorn Corporation]]. The suit was specialized for speed and equipped with only a single [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. During military operations, individuals equipped with the Mark IV would travel between vehicles providing reconnaissance.<ref name="EJ" />

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Evacuation of Jatee|book=Supernova (sourcebook)}}
